name: EVENTIKO INC.
business: The company is a development stage corporation with limited operations and no revenues from business operations. Its auditors have issued a going concern opinion, indicating substantial doubt about its ability to continue as an on-going business for the next twelve months.

exposures.sentence: The extent of the impact of the coronavirus ( COVID-19 ) outbreak on the financial performance of the Company will depend on future developments, including the duration and spread of the outbreak and related advisories and restrictions and the impact of COVID-19 on the overall economy, all of which are highly uncertain and cannot be predicted.
